subject: Two uniformed League Staff workers standing confidently in an arena setting
description: Two humanoid figures stand side by side in matching black-and-red uniforms — likely the Galar Pokemon League staff livery. Both figures have a confident, professional posture facing the viewer. The background shows an indoor arena or stadium corridor environment with red and grey tones. The figures appear to be young adults in coordinated workwear, one slightly taller than the other.
